title: color_for panics if relay sends pub_id shorter than 2 chars
description: color_for does &pub_id[..2] (byte index) then from_str_radix. If a relay sends Deliver.from or UserJoined.pub_id shorter than 2 bytes the client panics with 'byte index out of bounds'. All relay-generated pub_ids are 64-char hex hashes so this can't happen with the canonical relay, but a hostile or buggy relay — or a future caller passing a short string — causes an unrecoverable panic rather than a degraded display.
